items.title: Meet Noscroll, an AI bot that does your doomscrolling for you

items.title: Trump’s pick to run US cyber agency CISA asks to drop out
items.description: Sean Plankey has requested to withdraw his name to run the U.S. cybersecurity agency after a tumultuous year of chaotic temporary leadership.
